title: platanus × hispanica
intro: Platanus × hispanica, also known as the London planetree, is a hybrid deciduous tree resulting from the cross between the Oriental plane (Platanus orientalis) and the American sycamore (Platanus occidentalis). The bark and leaves of Platanus × hispanica have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have medicinal effects in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and even exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Platanus × hispanica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat respiratory and skin issues.
